meta.name: AquaSensei Design Tokens
meta.description: Single source of truth for platform colors and type. Edit here; tokens.h (firmware/LVGL) and tokens.css (app) are generated from this, never hand-edited. Semantic colors (accent, status, text) are shared across device and app for brand coherence. Only surface backgrounds differ by context: dark near-black on the AMOLED device screens, navy on the app, plus the app's light mode.
meta.reconciledFrom: Trident (0x0C1116/0x2DC6DE), P4 (0x101820/0x36D6C2 teal), roller mat web (#0C1829/#00B4D8), app (#081436/#7dd3ff)
